title: Beth hoffai’r hawlydd ei gael allan o'r hawliad?
h1: Beth hoffai’r hawlydd ei gael allan o'r hawliad? (dewisol)
legend: Beth hoffai’r hawlydd ei gael os yw ei hawliad yn llwyddiannus?

detailsTextComp.p1: [W]If a tribunal decides the claimant has been unfairly dismissed, they'll normally receive compensation which is made up of:
detailsTextComp.li1: [W]a basic award - fixed sum worked out using a standard formula
detailsTextComp.li2: [W]a compensatory award - compensation for the actual money lost due to dismissal, or which the claimant expects to lose in future because of their dismissal
detailsTextComp.p2: [W]Compensation can be reduced for various reasons and a tribunal will tell you more about this if it applies in the specific circumstances.
detailsTextComp.p3: [W]In disciplinary or grievance cases, the claimant may be entitled to an increased award if an employer fails to follow the guidance set out in the
detailsTextComp.p4: [W]Similarly, awards can be reduced if a tribunal decides the claimant failed to follow the guidance set out in the
detailsTextComp.acasLinkText: [W]Acas Code of Practice on disciplinary and grievance procedures (opens in new tab).
detailsTextComp.p5: [W]In certain claims, such as those involving discrimination, a tribunal may compensate the claimant for 'injury to feelings' (individual hurt and distress the claimant may have suffered) in addition to compensation for financial loss.

detailsTextRecom: [W]If the claimant's employer is found to have discriminated against them, a tribunal can make a recommendation that the respondent take specific steps to reduce the effect of the discrimination on the claimant
compensationOnlyHint: Gofynnir ichi roi amcangyfrif o gyfanswm yr iawndal

tribunalRecommendation.checkbox: Os ydych yn hawlio gwahaniaethu, argymhelliad gan y tribiwnlys

tribunalRecommendationHint: Gofynnir i chi ddisgrifio cais yr hawlydd i'r tribiwnlys

oldJob.checkbox: Os ydych yn hawlio am ddiswyddo annheg, i gael eu hen swydd yn ôl ac iawndal

anotherJob.checkbox: Os ydych yn hawlio am ddiswyddo annheg, i gael swydd arall gyda’r un cyflogwr neu gyflogwr cysylltiedig ac iawndal (ailgysylltiad)
